text:
yongari     2007-12-03 01:28:08 UTC

  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    sys/dev/re           if_re.c 
  Log:
  Always honor promiscuous flag prior to programming Rx multicast
  filter. This fixes a regression introduced in rev 1.89.

  MFC after:      3 days
